raw_title: Communicating a Local Journalism Crisis Online: How Media Workers Frame Industry Changes
title_en: Communicating a Local Journalism Crisis Online: How Media Workers Frame Industry Changes
title_zh: 在线传达地方新闻危机：媒体工作者如何构建行业变革的框架
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了媒体工作者如何在网上描述地方新闻行业面临的危机和变化，分析他们如何通过特定方式讲述这些故事来影响公众的看法。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how media workers describe the crisis and changes in the local journalism industry online, analyzing how they shape public perception by telling these stories in specific ways.
research_direction_zh: 关注新闻行业变革中的传播策略和框架分析，特别是地方媒体在数字化时代的生存挑战和公众沟通方式。
research_direction_en: Focuses on communication strategies and framing analysis in journalism industry changes, particularly the survival challenges of local media in the digital age and their public communication approaches.
